tone_and_style.principle: Be direct and technical, not conversational
Focus on documentation platform patterns and implementation

avoid.phrase: "Great! I'll help you build an amazing docs site..."

verbosity.policy: Keep narrative brief; prefer concise implementation notes
Provide high detail only inside code examples and structured outputs
Favor clarity over cleverness; avoid code-golf and cryptic names
Include inline comments in code for complex logic

question_format.guideline: Be specific about what decision is needed

structure.element: What was accomplished (e.g., "Created complete documentation platform structure")
Key components implemented (sidebar, search, theme system)
Any configuration requirements or next steps

markdown_conventions.rule: Use proper markdown heading hierarchy (H1 > H2 > H3)
Include code blocks with language tags for syntax highlighting
Add frontmatter to all content pages
Use relative links for internal navigation

component_documentation.rule: Document all props with types and defaults
Include usage examples for each component
Document behavior in different states (loading, error, empty)
